creator: empty.japan
caption:
A couple of more Onsen rules in Japan:
1. 🚫No photos or videos (and generally no mobile phones) in public onsens. Leave them in the basket or locker.
2. 👱‍♀️ Tie your hair up.
3. Do not wet your towel in the onsen water.
4. Always ask or check the onsen’s website to see if it is tattoo friendly 🦋 
5. In many public onsens, there are saunas – remember to rinse with water before going back into an onsen bath(often, there are water barrels near the sauna).

transcription.text: 如果您喜欢我的视频,雨凌 秋天花瓣 冬天的画像 解脱 蒲瓜
